marketing.pages.brand-kit.tiles.proposal: Contract-grade: manifest, schedule, manning, systems, investment.
marketing.pages.brand-kit.tiles.readme.b: Brand brain — voice, visual foundations, index.
marketing.pages.brand-kit.tiles.brandArc: 3 verticals, the metaphor, surface register, locks.
Claude Code brief — file map, rules, build order.

marketing.pages.careers.metadata.title: Careers — Build for Production
marketing.pages.careers.metadata.descrip: We're a small studio shipping the operating system for live events. Open roles ship work that surfaces on real shows — measured in load-ins survived, not story points burned.
marketing.pages.careers.hero.title: Build for Production.
marketing.pages.careers.hero.body: We're building the platform the live-events industry has needed for fifteen years — one operating system that runs the producer's desk, the crew's phone, and the client's portal off the same database. Small studio, deep ownership, real shows.
marketing.pages.careers.values.heading: How We Crew
marketing.pages.careers.values.crew.body: Small group, deep ownership. Every role touches every shell — marketing, ATLVS, portal, mobile.
marketing.pages.careers.values.tested.bo: We ship to real shows the weekend before each release. Bias to load-in survival over feature theater.
marketing.pages.careers.values.pricing.b: Per org, not per seat. We hold that line internally — no token economies, no perf review caste system.
marketing.pages.careers.values.brandFirs: The platform reads like a magazine. Brutal where it should be, breathing where it can. Code follows.
marketing.pages.careers.values.distribut: Studio in Miami, crew across timezones. Async-first. Travel for site visits and shows, not standups.
marketing.pages.careers.values.equity.bo: Real ownership stake, four-year vest, ten-year exercise window. We pay competitively in cash too.
marketing.pages.careers.roles.heading: Open Roles
marketing.pages.careers.roles.empty.body: We hire deliberately and post openings here when they exist. If your background is unusual or specifically aligned with what we're building, we read every thoughtful intro that comes through the contact form.
marketing.pages.careers.faq.heading: Careers FAQ
marketing.pages.careers.faq.hiring.q: Is the studio hiring right now?
marketing.pages.careers.faq.hiring.a: We're a small team and we hire deliberately. When we do open a role, it lands here first. If nothing's posted, it's truly closed — but we always read thoughtful intros at the contact link below.
marketing.pages.careers.faq.visas.a: For senior engineering and design roles, yes — case by case. We'll be explicit on each posting whether sponsorship is on the table.
marketing.pages.careers.faq.remote.a: Distributed by default. The Miami studio is open if you're nearby and want desk time, but no role requires you to be there.
marketing.pages.careers.faq.interview.a: Three calls: intro with a founder, working session with a peer (no whiteboard puzzles — we look at real work), and a paid trial week if both sides want to keep going.
marketing.pages.careers.faq.notHire.q: What do you NOT hire for?
marketing.pages.careers.faq.notHire.a: Project managers, scrum coaches, and "head of" titles where the work is meetings. Engineering managers code; design leads design; founders sell.
marketing.pages.careers.cta.title: Not Listed? Tell Us Anyway.
marketing.pages.careers.cta.subtitle: If your background is unusual or specifically built for what we ship, write us. The studio reads every note.
marketing.pages.changelog.metadata.title: Changelog — what shipped on ATLVS Technologies
marketing.pages.changelog.metadata.descr: Release notes for ATLVS Technologies. Every shipping change, with context. Feature launches, reliability, security, and performance.
marketing.pages.changelog.hero.title: What Shipped.
marketing.pages.changelog.hero.bodyBefor: Every release since v0.6, with enough context to understand why we shipped it. Subscribe via RSS at
marketing.pages.changelog.cta.title: Try What's New
marketing.pages.changelog.cta.subtitle: Every change ships to free and trial accounts immediately.
marketing.pages.community.detail.cta.tit: Ship Your Next Show on ATLVS Technologies
marketing.pages.community.detail.cta.sub: Free on the Access tier. 14-day trial of Professional.
marketing.pages.community.meta.title: Community — the production teams building on ATLVS
marketing.pages.community.meta.descripti: The festivals, tours, agencies, and fabrication shops running their production on ATLVS, GVTEWAY, and COMPVSS. Member stories, numbers, and what they actually ship.
marketing.pages.community.hero.title: Production teams, building in public.
marketing.pages.community.hero.subtitle: The festivals, tours, agencies, and fabrication shops running their shows on ATLVS Technologies. Real workflows. Real numbers. Real receipts.
marketing.pages.community.stories.title: Member Stories
marketing.pages.community.stories.subtit: What they were running before, what they switched, what measurably improved.
marketing.pages.community.join.title: Your Team, Here.
marketing.pages.community.join.body: Shipping real shows on ATLVS Technologies? We're always looking to document new member stories. A short interview, anonymized numbers, your words.
marketing.pages.community.cta.title: Be the Next Story
marketing.pages.community.cta.subtitle: Start free. Ship a show. We'll talk afterward.
Side by side, without the marketing math.
marketing.pages.compare.detail.whenTheyW: We're not the answer to every problem. These are the cases where they're the right call.
marketing.pages.compare.detail.cta.title: ATLVS Is Open.
marketing.pages.compare.detail.cta.subti: Free forever for small teams. Migrate when you're ready.
marketing.pages.compare.meta.title: From the General-Purpose Tools
marketing.pages.compare.meta.description: Notes for teams arriving from a general-purpose tool. We don't run scorecards. We define what we are.
marketing.pages.compare.hero.title: We Don't Compare. We Define.
marketing.pages.compare.hero.body: Producers land here because a general-purpose tool taught them what they didn't want. These pages are notes for the search engine — what we are, said plainly. No scorecards.
marketing.pages.compare.cta.title: ATLVS Is Open.
marketing.pages.compare.cta.subtitle: Free forever for small teams.
marketing.pages.contact.metadata.title: Contact — Talk to the Studio
marketing.pages.contact.metadata.descrip: Direct line. Demos, partnerships, concierge support, Festival access. Routed to producers who've run the room.
marketing.pages.contact.hero.title: Talk to the Studio.
marketing.pages.contact.hero.bodyPrefix: No dark patterns. No forced calls. Sign up free at
marketing.pages.contact.hero.bodySuffix: . Or request a walkthrough below — one business day, usually faster.
marketing.pages.contact.routes.walkthrou: Thirty minutes. Screen-share ATLVS wired to a real production. No deck.
marketing.pages.contact.routes.studio.bo: Direct line to a producer. One business day, usually faster.
marketing.pages.contact.routes.concierge: For current customers — triaged by tier. Festival gets an SLA.
Integrations, agencies, distribution. Build with us.

marketing.pages.contact.form.fields.demo: I'd rather walk it through live than trade emails.
